quiz.question:
White has just gone f6 with the idea of attacking the king. 

It is an imbalanced endgame. Who is better?

answers.text: Black is better because of the a-pawn.

feedback.text: In short, yes. The attack isn't getting anywhere. ...h6 is the best engine move here, but even ...Nf8 for ...Ng6 is good, and the point is that Black's pawn is faster.

distractors.text: White is better because the black king isn't safe.

feedback.text: There are several ways of dealing with the attack, and just the pawn and queen won't break through.

distractors.text: This position is equal and should end in a draw because both sides have activity that cancel each other out.

feedback.text: I think one of the side's activity is better than the other's.
